title: aira brevifolia
intro: Aira brevifolia, also known as the short beard grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aira brevifolia include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Aira brevifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
